Operation 'createUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are too generic. Added clarity about required authentication (AdminApiKey), what inputs are expected (CreateUserRequest schema), what is returned (User object with ID), and the side effect that the user becomes immediately available. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Creates a new user in the Hanko instance.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new user account in the Hanko instance. Accepts user creation parameters (email, optional metadata) via CreateUserRequest. Returns the newly created User object with assigned user ID. Requires AdminApiKey authentication. The user is immediately available for authentication flows.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added clarity about required authentication (AdminApiKey), what inputs are expected (CreateUserRequest schema), what is returned (User object with ID), and the side effect that the user becomes immediately available. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is too generic. Description lacks input parameter details and authentication requirements. Added clarity about the required user_id parameter, authentication method, what fields are returned, and explicitly noted this is read-only to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and safety.

data.current_description: Returns details for a specific user by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific user by their user ID. Requires the user_id path parameter and AdminApiKey authentication. Returns the complete User object including email, created timestamp, and associated credentials. No side effects - this is a read-only operation.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks input parameter details and authentication requirements. message: Operation 'deleteUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary lacks emphasis on permanence. Description is missing critical details about authentication requirements, the user_id parameter, response format, and important side effects (credential invalidation, session termination). AI agents need this information to understand the destructive nature of this operation and use it appropriately.

data.current_description: Deletes a user from the Hanko instance.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a user account and all associated data from the Hanko instance. Requires the user_id path parameter and AdminApiKey authentication. Returns HTTP 204 No Content on success. Side effects: user credentials are invalidated, active sessions are terminated, and the user can no longer authenticate.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks emphasis on permanence. Description is missing critical details about authentication requirements, the user_id parameter, response format, and important side effects (credential invalidation, session termination). AI agents need this information to understand the destructive nature of this operation and use it appropriately.

data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks authentication requirements, parameter details, and response content specifics. Added security context (AdminApiKey requirement), clarified parameter support, and specified response content to help AI agents understand access control and usage patterns.
